problem.title: Excel Sheet Column Number
problem.description: Given a string columnTitle that represents the column title as appears in an Excel sheet, return its corresponding column number.
assumptions: Input is a valid Excel column title (A-Z, AA-AZ, ...).

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Base 26 Conversion
solutions.description: This problem is a base-26 number conversion where 'A'=1, 'B'=2, ..., 'Z'=26. The algorithm processes each character left-to-right, multiplying the running result by 26 and adding the current character's value. The key insight is that Excel columns form a bijective base-26 numeral system with no zero digit.
